name: Steve and Sue's Christmas Gift Candy
recipeIngredient: 1 package Eagle Brand pretzels (the small "A" shaped ones)
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill a crock pot halfway with water and turn on high.
2. Place the lid on upside down.
3. Cover a flat surface with wax paper.
4. Chop up some chocolate almond bark and place the pieces in the upside-down crockpot lid.
5. Go have a drink.
6. After finishing your drink, stagger back to the crock pot.
7. Using tongs, dredge the Ritz crackers and pretzels until each is thoroughly covered with candy.
8. Place on wax paper to cool.
My wife likes to use Wilson's candy colors to color the white almond bark when using that; if you don't stir it in well, you get a nice attractive swirl look. This also works quite well with fruits, nuts, and other additions (and it's lots of fun too).
